patient_summary: Olivia, a 73-year-old female (patient ID 104, phone +1 310 556 1256) has multiple documented diagnoses including mixed dyslipidemia (documented 06/30/2023), essential hypertension (06/30/2023), postoperative and unspecified anemia (06/30/2023), and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus (01/21/2025). Major procedures include a scheduled/performed colonoscopy with biopsy on 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Significant labs include a 07/03/2023 lipid panel with Triglycerides 158 (H), VLDL 32 (H), LDL 62 and a ferritin 266.8 (H); 01/11/2021 BMP with Glucose 199 (H) and GFR 50 (A). Functional limitations documented include difficulty walking/climbing stairs and difficulty with dressing/bathing. Multiple care teams are listed, including Hand Hoyet A MD (PCP) and Piedmont specialists. Note: source documents contain conflicts for date of birth and legal sex, and inconsistent tobacco use documentation.
